issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with target 'Event', not just 'Activated'. Current DSL does not specify that this triggers on Event activation.
Condition is 'Always' but card text requires two conditions: (1) hand size ≤ 4 cards AND (2) hasn't drawn a card using this Leader's effect during this turn. These conditions are missing entirely.
Action is mandatory (DrawCard) but card text says 'you may draw', indicating optional action. DSL does not reflect optionality.
